name: prd-prototype-suite
description: Detachable PRD prototype skill suite for reference-driven business flows, low-fidelity wireframes, and editable clickable HTML prototypes.

interface.shortDescription: Reference-driven PRD flow, wireframe, and HTML prototype skills.
interface.longDescription: A detachable suite of governed PRD prototype skills that analyze prototype references, map product business flows, design low-fidelity wireframe previews, and build editable clickable HTML prototypes for product review.
defaultPrompt: Analyze this prototype reference before drawing wireframes.
Map the core product business flow for this PRD.
Create a low-fidelity prototype preview for this confirmed flow.
Build an editable clickable HTML prototype for this product flow.
